name: The Congregation
overview: Driven by an urgent need to amass a large sum of money in a short time, a man assembles a team specializing in theft and fraud, leveraging its members' skills in disguise and deception to exploit their victims. Though united by a common goal, each member harbors their own motives and ambitions.

trailers.title: الإعلان التشويقي الرسمي لسلسلة #الرباعة 🤣🔥 يُـعرض في رمضان على شاشة #الشروقTV 📺
